DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Markun Zusman Freniere & Compton LLP's demurrer to the complaint filed on December 13, 2016 is overruled as to the first cause of action for breach of contract, the second cause of action for promissory estoppel, the third cause of action for unjust enrichment and the fifth cause of action for promissory fraud and sustained without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action for conversion.( See word minutes for details). Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

Defendant Markun Zusman Freniere & Crompton Llp Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Markun Zusman Freniere & Crompton Llp Demurrer To Complaint is a duplicate entry.
